## Obsidian community review

- Set GitHub Release titles to match version tags (fixes empty release name warnings)
- English canonical README with installation and basic usage; Chinese moved to README.zh-CN.md
- Remove `text-decoration` and `!important` from reader CSS for Obsidian 1.11.x lint compatibility

## Fixes

- Bookshelf and reading-state performance improvements carried from 0.6.4 development
